runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - Langfuse Feedback Trace Recovery

expertAssessments.rationale: Production landing, guest entry, dashboard, sidebar chat, and feedback loop were replayed successfully on the deployed fix.
Sampled production stream payload exposed traceId, feedback request carried the same traceId, and Cloud Run /monitoring reported Langfuse ready with sampleRate 10%.
Feedback path completed without auth/runtime errors and continued to persist ratings in the production database while forwarding to Langfuse.
Deployment d3dfa842b was READY/PROMOTED on production and the live Vercel app continued to serve Cloud Run streaming responses with expected X-AI headers.
Playwright MCP reproduced the sampled-trace scenario in 3 attempts and captured the exact feedback request/response payload needed for regression proof.
The trace-linked feedback path is restored, so production AI evaluations can again be tied to Langfuse traces for downstream scoring and analysis.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period usage reviewed after production QA; effectiveCost about $15.28 and billedCost remained 0 with no meaningful overage spike.

completedImprovements.title: AI feedback traceId propagation to Langfuse
completedImprovements.evidence: On production commit d3dfa842b, Playwright MCP observed a sampled stream traceId on attempt 3, the feedback request body included the same traceId, and /api/ai/feedback returned langfuseStatus=success. Cloud Run /monitoring also reported Langfuse ready and operational.

notes: Guest PIN login with 4231 succeeded and system start redirected to /dashboard normally.
The sampled production trace was observed on attempt 3; previous attempts had no traceId because Langfuse sampling is configured at 10%.
Cloud Run /monitoring returned langfuse.eventCount=61, sampleRate=10%, isOperational=true, and isReady=true.
